lesson.menu_title: People Around Me -- Describing Colleagues, Clients, and the Partner
lesson.subtitle: Aula 5 -- People Around Me -- Describing the People at Work
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Maísa de Oliveira Santos | Aula 5 -- People Around Me

listenings.text: Hello. Let me tell you about my boss, Mr. Reed. He is a great manager. He is very smart and hardworking. He is also patient and kind with the team. He has short gray hair and glasses. Every day, he helps us. He is friendly with everyone in the office. I like him a lot. What is your boss like?

Hi. This is my friend at work, Ana. She is very funny and friendly. She is smart, too. Ana is confident, and she is never nervous in a meeting. She has long dark hair. She is quiet in the morning, but she talks a lot at lunch. She is a good colleague and a good friend.

extra_audio.text: This is my manager, Carla. She is smart and kind. She has short hair. She is friendly with everyone.
